statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); out="$model"; if [ -n "$used" ]; then out="$out | $(printf 'ctx: %.0f%% used' "$used")"; fi; five_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.used_percentage // empty'); five_reset=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.resets_at // empty'); if [ -n "$five_pct" ]; then if [ -n "$five_reset" ]; then five_str=$(date -r "$five_reset" '+%H:%M' 2>/dev/null); out="$out | $(printf '5h: %.0f%%' "$five_pct")$( [ -n "$five_str" ] && printf ' (resets %s)' "$five_str" )"; else out="$out | $(printf '5h: %.0f%%' "$five_pct")"; fi; fi; week_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.seven_day.used_percentage // empty'); week_reset=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.seven_day.resets_at // empty'); if [ -n "$week_pct" ]; then if [ -n "$week_reset" ]; then week_str=$(date -r "$week_reset" '+%a %H:%M' 2>/dev/null); out="$out | $(printf '7d: %.0f%%' "$week_pct")$( [ -n "$week_str" ] && printf ' (resets %s)' "$week_str" )"; else out="$out | $(printf '7d: %.0f%%' "$week_pct")"; fi; fi; printf '%s' "$out"
